name: bose-d365-native-host
description: Dynamics Audio Companion — Native Messaging Host

scripts.build: npm run bundle && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync(process.execPath, 'dynamics-audio-companion.exe')" && npx postject dynamics-audio-companion.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
